x1x2x3x4x5x6x7x8.name: Orientation & Basic Training
x1x2x3x4x5x6x7x8.description: Initial days at the Corner, surveillance training, and learning to fly.

e1e2e3e4e5e6e7e8.title: Pizza Surveillance
e1e2e3e4e5e6e7e8.notes: Tim invites us for training. We order a supreme pizza (no anchovies/pineapple) to follow the delivery driver. The driver arrives in a painted orange Gremlin.

f1f2f3f4f5f6f7f8.title: Rooftop Spanning
f1f2f3f4f5f6f7f8.notes: Tim spans us to the roof of Walgreen's to watch the delivery guy. We span to multiple rooftops along the route.

y1y2y3y4y5y6y7y8.name: The Long Span (Living History)
y1y2y3y4y5y6y7y8.description: A rapid succession of spans Down and Up, experiencing years of history and future history.

g1g2g3g4g5g6g7g8.title: Span Down: 2023 to 2019
g1g2g3g4g5g6g7g8.notes: Series of spans down one year at a time, resting in between. Witnessed Covid era.

h1h2h3h4h5h6h7h8.title: Span Up: 2019 to 2027
h1h2h3h4h5h6h7h8.notes: Spanning up year by year. Witnessed: The Purge disrupting companies, AI rising, Russia losing war/Putin assassinated, Trump dying in office, President Vance, ASI emergence, increased environmental disasters.

z1z2z3z4z5z6z7z8.name: The 3-Month Task & Euclid Ave
z1z2z3z4z5z6z7z8.description: Completing the 3-month isolation tasks and the surveillance of 1402 West Euclid Ave.

i1i2i3i4i5i6i7i8.title: Three Month Task Start
i1i2i3i4i5i6i7i8.notes: Begin the task. Henry spans up first. Then spend 3 months spanning to 1800 hours.

j1j2j3j4j5j6j7j8.title: Fixing the Mistake
j1j2j3j4j5j6j7j8.notes: Spent 22 days fixing a mistake from Feb 20th. Spanned down 11 days, fixed it, spanned back up.

k1k2k3k4k5k6k7k8.title: Euclid Ave Surveillance
k1k2k3k4k5k6k7k8.notes: Observation task at 1402 West Euclid Ave. Taking photos at 1800 hours daily. Window boarded up on 8th day, replaced on 12th day.

m1m2m3m4m5m6m7m8.name: The Soap & The Robbers
m1m2m3m4m5m6m7m8.description: Retrieving the anomalous bar of soap from bank robbers.

n1n2n3n4n5n6n7n8.title: Span Down to Robbery
n1n2n3n4n5n6n7n8.notes: Following Henry's suggestion to steal the object when unattended.

o1o2o3o4o5o6o7o8.title: Meeting Alexandra
o1o2o3o4o5o6o7o8.notes: Sent a note to Taylor via slipshank. Found flip phone. Called number, met Alexandra (Foxhorn).

p1p2p3p4p5p6p7p8.title: Securing the Soap
p1p2p3p4p5p6p7p8.notes: Alexandra's team clears the shop. We interrogate the robbers. Recovered the soap. Encountered Rami (ex-boyfriend) as a soldier.

q1q2q3q4q5q6q7q8.name: Blue Sky Rising & The Fridge
q1q2q3q4q5q6q7q8.description: Training at the NJ Corner and the Fridge Exercise with Matthijs.

r1r2r3r4r5r6r7r8.title: Blue Sky Rising
r1r2r3r4r5r6r7r8.notes: Visited novice corner in West Orange, NJ. Took 'blending in' classes.

s1s2s3s4s5s6s7s8.title: Pranking the Quicker
s1s2s3s4s5s6s7s8.notes: Attempted to photograph the Quicker. Failed multiple times. Left sticky note.

t1t2t3t4t5t6t7t8.title: The Fridge Exercise
t1t2t3t4t5t6t7t8.notes: Matthijs's training. Susan caused Frag by moving an object. We had to span down to fix it using cameras to detect the time of change.

u1u2u3u4u5u6u7u8.name: Academic Hiatus (Subjective)
u1u2u3u4u5u6u7u8.description: Years spent finishing degree and training.

v1v2v3v4v5v6v7v8.title: School & Pranking Carl
v1v2v3v4v5v6v7v8.notes: Successfully pranked Carl to impress the Quicker. Spent a year levelly finishing degree (2024-2025).

w1w2w3w4w5w6w7w8.name: Germanic Studies & 1970
w1w2w3w4w5w6w7w8.description: Long-term spanning operation to learn German and operate in the Cold War era.

aa1aa2aa3aa4aa5aa6.title: Language Study
aa1aa2aa3aa4aa5aa6.notes: Span Down to 2022 to spend 18 months studying German language and history.

bb1bb2bb3bb4bb5bb6.title: Arrival in 1970
bb1bb2bb3bb4bb5bb6.notes: Traveled to Germany, 1970. Met Else Weschler. Received false papers (Jasmine Richards).

cc1cc2cc3cc4cc5cc6.title: Meeting Karsten
cc1cc2cc3cc4cc5cc6.notes: Helped with cargo delivery to Babel. Met pilot Karsten Thoma. Became intimate.

d1d2d3d4d5d6d7d8.name: Tracking Thomas Lowe
d1d2d3d4d5d6d7d8.description: Hunting the Narcissist lawyer through time.

ee1ee2ee3ee4ee5ee6.title: Identifying Lowe
ee1ee2ee3ee4ee5ee6.notes: Observed Thomas Lowe in Oct 2023. Identified him as head legal counsel.

ff1ff2ff3ff4ff5ff6.title: Roosevelt Inn & Frag
ff1ff2ff3ff4ff5ff6.notes: Span down to 1973. Witnessed Harper Walton being fragged.

gg1gg2gg3gg4gg5gg6.title: Sunshine Mine Investigation
gg1gg2gg3gg4gg5gg6.notes: Span to 1972 Kellogg. Investigating the mine collapse Narcissist plot. Noah Goodson identified as target.

hh1hh2hh3hh4hh5hh6.title: Taking Down Noah
hh1hh2hh3hh4hh5hh6.notes: Ambushed Noah in his motel room. Foxhorn (Alexandra) assists. He is put in 'cold storage'.

i1i2i3i4i5i6i7i8.name: The Sunshine Hotel & Room 10
i1i2i3i4i5i6i7i8.description: Confronting Lowe and the anomalous Room 10.

jj1jj2jj3jj4jj5jj6.title: Capturing Lowe
jj1jj2jj3jj4jj5jj6.notes: Used microwave device to stop Lowe spanning. He triggered 'The Smile' entity. Massive Frag event.

kk1kk2kk3kk4kk5kk6.title: Ward Recovery
kk1kk2kk3kk4kk5kk6.notes: Recovering in the Ward from the Smile encounter. Subjective 3 months.

ll1ll2ll3ll4ll5ll6.title: Room 10 Investigation
ll1ll2ll3ll4ll5ll6.notes: Investigating the demon summoning circle and Room 10. Found objects via Polaroid.

mm1mm2mm3mm4mm5mm6.name: The Antiquarian Path
mm1mm2mm3mm4mm5mm6.description: Joining the Antiquarians and further education.

nn1nn2nn3nn4nn5nn6.title: Smithsonian Initiation
nn1nn2nn3nn4nn5nn6.notes: Visited Smithsonian with Naomi and Karsten. Met Clara Llopis. Joined Antiquarians.

oo1oo2oo3oo4oo5oo6.title: Graduate School (Cambridge)
oo1oo2oo3oo4oo5oo6.notes: Spent two years earning a graduate degree at Cambridge and working at a museum.

pp1pp2pp3pp4pp5pp6.name: The Chicago Job (Karl)
pp1pp2pp3pp4pp5pp6.description: Dealing with Karl and the Objects in Chicago.

qq1qq2qq3qq4qq5qq6.title: Cafe Ambush
qq1qq2qq3qq4qq5qq6.notes: Met Karl. Ambushed by levelers/narcissists. Firefight ensued. Shanker involved.

rr1rr2rr3rr4rr5rr6.title: Recruiting Shanker
rr1rr2rr3rr4rr5rr6.notes: Shanker joins the Continuum after the cafe incident.

tt1tt2tt3tt4tt5tt6.title: Surveillance Loop
tt1tt2tt3tt4tt5tt6.notes: Surveillance job with Shanker. Encountered Leveler on roof. Closed the loop (Elder Hettie rescued Junior Hettie).

uu1uu2uu3uu4uu5uu6.title: The Appreciation (1945)
uu1uu2uu3uu4uu5uu6.notes: Spanned to 1945 Wales for 'The Appreciation'. Witnessed The Reveal (future humans/aliens).

vv1vv2vv3vv4vv5vv6.title: Double Time Training
vv1vv2vv3vv4vv5vv6.notes: Back in 2023. Desi teaching double time and Gemini. Hettie demonstrates Gemini with Karsten.

3dakf203mlDewePm.name: Highschool
3dakf203mlDewePm.description: A straight "A" student that took STEM electives. Henry went to a co-ed public school that was actually fairly good all things considered. He was on the Swim team for 2 years in Middle School and 4 years in High School. Henry did an hour in the weight room for stretching and weight training, and then did 2 and half hours of swimming. He did this every day for 6 days a week every Winter season.

8FXy29eVcD7ULbbQ.name: Middle School @
8FXy29eVcD7ULbbQ.description: A straight "A" student that took STEM electives. Henry went to a co-ed public school that was actually fairly good all things considered. He was on the Swim team for 2 years in Middle School and 4 years in High School. Henry did an hour in the weight room for stretching and weight training, and then did 2 and half hours of swimming. He did this every day for 6 days a week every Winter season.

XGHFKPSLX02GK375.name: TV Knowledge
XGHFKPSLX02GK375.description: Knowledge of various cartoons and live action shows, various video games, early internet videos, and the power of friendship.

AWxVL101ibxIepzd.title: Born
AWxVL101ibxIepzd.notes: Born in an Upstate NY Hospital. Born 3 weeks earlier than expected

dPY1TsGaZAl5B8j8.title: Pre-school
dPY1TsGaZAl5B8j8.notes: The start of Henry being in school all his life. XX Pre-school.

yJvgsox10s9hsr0i.title: First Day of K-5 School
yJvgsox10s9hsr0i.notes: Started Fall Quarter, graduated Summer Quarter. XX Central School

d7ahEcsGpKwV2Q4x.title: On-Again-Off-Again Relationship With Music
d7ahEcsGpKwV2Q4x.notes: Tried violin, then piano, then violin again. Never had the time to commit for a long enough time to get good or learn enough to remember. A School, a church, and a house. Lasts ~10 years.

DFvxXC0R7pICZw5C.title: Lack of parental self-care
DFvxXC0R7pICZw5C.notes: Both parents struggled to understand self-care, self-esteem, and stress-management. Prevented Henry from understanding most of these things, and this required therapy to learn later in life.

jHhPbdzGBIv3qD0b.name: Hobby Shooting
jHhPbdzGBIv3qD0b.description:
Studies weapon knowledge by reading wiki articles and watching videos of experts.

Does target shooting. A lot of air gun shooting, some CO2 and gunpowder shooting. Aside from video games (mouse and VR), always shot at targets.

3lGvoFipDZ78YNC2.name: Exercise 1@
3lGvoFipDZ78YNC2.description: Personal training. Aerobic and Anaerobic exercise. Knows Health Fundamentals, has Personal Training discipline, and does casual Bike Riding -occasionally long-distance bike riding (over 10 miles in a day).

m2uM0ZpZSEkHBgZT.name: Therapy 2#
m2uM0ZpZSEkHBgZT.description: Focus on building habits (and recognizing them in myself and others)

saQTEv8pDzZRzESx.name: BSE Comp/Elec!
saQTEv8pDzZRzESx.description: I learned circuits, programming, and did a lot of dorm socializing. Tried for an Engineer, then tried to be a tech, then switched to another major.

QNKvWIXWb3zh1Icj.name: BS Communications!
QNKvWIXWb3zh1Icj.description: Became a technical writer, and learned how to analyze and write for target audiences, and did a lot of dorm socializing.

ZUwFRh5cwQqxKe14.name: Bureaucracy
ZUwFRh5cwQqxKe14.description: Forced to navigate red tape and convince bureaucrats to justify staying in college.

UbP9P38D8IqXUd4r.name: Military Re-enactments
UbP9P38D8IqXUd4r.description: Played in several eras. Mostly played from WWII to current day to Star Wars. Learned and practice leadership skills, military doctrine, and small unit tactics.

q5FxkCDiGLaYFUsq.name: Exercise 2@
q5FxkCDiGLaYFUsq.description:
Personal training. Aerobic and Anaerobic exercise. Knows Health Fundamentals, has Personal Training discipline, and transitioned to Shooting Practice.

A lot of air gun shooting, some CO2 and gunpowder shooting. Aside from video games (mouse and VR), always shot at targets. Now does some kind of combat shooting training [To Be Determined what this is].

PqZmz9BI9RkPgUzK.name: Undergraduate College
PqZmz9BI9RkPgUzK.description: BA in Science for Communications and a Minor in Business Administration

2lmIzlJdaQtduXwG.title: Applied for college
2lmIzlJdaQtduXwG.notes: Tried to go for Phd in Chemical Physics, got sick 1 month in and had to leave.

yTC1zAZlp2LpwUFR.title: Re-applied to college
yTC1zAZlp2LpwUFR.notes: Started in Computer Engineering, switched to Computer Engineering Tech and Electrical Engineering Tech double major, ended on Communications. Lasted 5 years.

0pXhpaNdNhLuLBx1.name: The Force
0pXhpaNdNhLuLBx1.description: Was at Skywalker Ranch at the Fraternities job fair. I spanned down to the night between each day, spent some time talking to the Star Wars and Star Trek nerds, and then took an empty soda can and found a quiet room. I sat, cleared my mind, and attempted to move the can with my mind. I sensed a presence as if I was looking over a deep body of water and saw something under the waves. I slowly reach my hand out with my palm up both in my mind's eye and in physical space. I did not move the can. HOWEVER, when I stood up to grab the can, it was now full of something fruity. It didn't smell like whatever the can held originally (before it was emptied and Henry took it to practice).

At45AX75waZCDAW0.name: Foxhorn Self Defense
At45AX75waZCDAW0.description: They throw me around the mat. I get a lot of falling practice. I learn to minimize damage from falling and being thrown around.

Fbmzi9rDMNeQkPHJ.title: Harper Walton's Frag Case
Fbmzi9rDMNeQkPHJ.notes: Investigated how Harper Walton was fragged involving a relative surviving a mining accident that should have killed him.

hOiZpXqtV5R2ga9p.title: Food exploration
hOiZpXqtV5R2ga9p.notes: Explored food every decade jump down

ju056RktBlAxaBY1.title: Experienced Computing Culture 1973 and 1970
ju056RktBlAxaBY1.notes: Saw the before and after of the Datapoint being released, the aftermath of the phone phreaks.

DLDQfPEThvkPsX53.title: Spanning Back Up To Go Home

SHAIDG6ZPsVdM9t9.title: Finishing Up
SHAIDG6ZPsVdM9t9.notes: We get the mark, and then we go back down to 1970 to make the information delivery. Henry is the one to deliver it outside the door of the Roosevelt Inn's Mentor's room, leaving before the mentor appears.

wvpK51Kp4RUscnFF.name: Harper Walton's Time Combat
wvpK51Kp4RUscnFF.description: As we are going down to deliver documents, we spotted someone who was fragged. Since we were not supposed to see that in Known Time, we got fragged ourselves. This started an investigation into how this frag began. It led us to find that a mine accident that should have killed people did not occur due to narcissism. Hettie and I investigate.

MHAbPoOPIN8iir25.title: Harper Walton's Frag Case
MHAbPoOPIN8iir25.notes: General visual details of Harper Walton. Overweight white woman, dressed for the time, some jewelry and make-up.

BvVexKqWjXBz0EyJ.title: Taken To 1972 Kellog Mine
BvVexKqWjXBz0EyJ.notes: We were taken down to 1972 in a local motel to investigate the mine disruption.

5iACkOnd0Ds4AfSn.title: Hettie Went Down 2 Months
5iACkOnd0Ds4AfSn.notes: She posed as a secretary in the Kellog Mine to find the Narcissist. She eventually finds the mark, as he's using future tech.

zSFi1uVTIJb42mWV.title: RV's
zSFi1uVTIJb42mWV.notes: Hettie comes back to the motel, Henry and Hettie go back to 1973.

RJ3Hg81gws4SiyZL.title: Capturing The Narcissists
RJ3Hg81gws4SiyZL.notes: The Foxhorn bring us down to capture the mark, do so, and the combat is over.

GyWx0IfGit8ZevfO.title: Socialization
GyWx0IfGit8ZevfO.notes: Went to a Computer Club in Jacksonville

aCW6vjcLe7ON8XgW.title: Started Going To Martial Arts Gym

iaJOPobPp0xG7X2A.title: Attended To Job
iaJOPobPp0xG7X2A.notes: Worked with Sandman to get prototype publishing documents, and Henry goes to a lot of conventions to playtest and get a follower base. Do this for 3 months until June.

JnP7iuce5l0DcDAg.name: Thomas Lowe Incident
JnP7iuce5l0DcDAg.description: We set out to take what we know about Thomas Lowe and then capture him.

hsboBPw8p7pOQGOs.title: Debrief
hsboBPw8p7pOQGOs.notes: Henry and Hettie tell Susan everything. Hettie has a mini-trauma attack which Henry talks her out of. Everything involving the Smile entity is erased the moment we say it. Our memories of the event are explained by Susan as they were erased. Turns out a Smile Demon showed up. He was Thomas Lowe's Mentor according to Susan.

SqXpaj715JOmMgII.title: New Combat
SqXpaj715JOmMgII.notes: Observe Thomas Lowe leaving work and going back to where he lives.

oGGJz1JTMcrab5Yy.title: Established RV
oGGJz1JTMcrab5Yy.notes: Rented an apartment at the Avery Hotel in Boise, Idaho to use as an RV from November 7th to November 21st 2023. This will let us span to so we can continuously be ready to follow Thomas Lowe along his route.

iQvUSmKljHoUhGZn.title: Got punched a lot by some woman in a park
iQvUSmKljHoUhGZn.notes: Got punched a lot by some woman in a park, so I can blend in to watch Thomas. Spanned down each day to go for a week, shaving slight more each time, integrating myself with the group backwards.

6FRbSKF92j306h8o.title: Found Thomas Lowe's Abode
6FRbSKF92j306h8o.notes: 2654 S Creek Pointe Ln, Eagle, Idaho. It is a gated community.

59hI723AJVQC2fFD.title: Knowledge from Yeo
59hI723AJVQC2fFD.notes:
Susan and I got talking about sources of information and how we can use time travel to find information on Thomas Lowe. After some talking, Susan said something about how information can only be given in a loop if the source of the information already exists. That is when I got the idea that Thomas Lowe may have been a Spanner, and we can ask the Scribes for that information about him. I then went to my corner's resident Scribe. I asked Yeo for information on Thomas Lowe in case he was a prior Spanner. This is what I was told:

Thomas Lowe was a Continuum Spanner, and Engineer. He "left the path for reasons he would be best to explain" and "he is the reason [Henry] is in the Continuum in the first place. He has theories on how [the Continuum] should relate to these artifacts, and they work for him, but nobody else. We have been looking to bring him in for quite some time." He left the Continuum in the 1980's, he left at Span 2, FIINAH on if people can increase one's Span Level outside the Continuum. He lives his life without disrupting anything, so anything we do must be done linearly to not frag his history or futury.

uWih5VDdVcmhUpY7.title: Met in a cafe in Boise to discuss plans
uWih5VDdVcmhUpY7.notes: The knowledge from Yeo made me suspect that Thomas Lowe could potentially be of a Span level higher than 2, and that would be impossible for Hettie and I to handle as Span 2s. This made us accept Susan's (or was it the Administration's?) recommendation for Foxhorn help. Alexandra gave us guidance on a plan to move a truck into the gated community and activate a frequency emitter to disrupt Thomas Lowe's ability to Span and then taze him.

W09ny1Q3SghBchIC.title: The Setup
W09ny1Q3SghBchIC.notes: Henry spanned down several days, used online social media to discover that a neighbor is getting into pilates and will also be out of the house for a week. Henry then uses online clips from social media and current AI voice tools to make a fake voice call to the gated community's security office that a package will be arriving in a few days that will require the van to be let through.

FuHAjHSxP2N1pzY9.title: The Execution
FuHAjHSxP2N1pzY9.notes: Alexandra gets us the van, the emitter, and quick-take-down weapons to move in on Thomas Lowe. We follow the plan according to The Setup, we activate the emitter, we move in and Alexandra. I don't remember what happened after that.

CZz5aMg3B0xgHfIj.name: New Mexico Excursion
CZz5aMg3B0xgHfIj.description: Henry has a theory that these objects, with their quasi-sentience, have sentimentality that causes the objects to appear to those that intend to use them. Further more, Henry believes that these objects share a commonality -they were all in the room at one point. This leads Henry to believe that these objects share a narrative. They have some kind of story or event that played out that gave these objects the powers they have. I took Hettie with me in a car to the destination to investigate. We found Room 10, just not exactly.

NVYkk33ifBIsC1Ma.title: To New Mexico
NVYkk33ifBIsC1Ma.notes: We get the Photo Object, and we head to New Mexico to investigate Henry's hunch.

lNcEUknEiqOuaBuf.title: Investigating The Area
lNcEUknEiqOuaBuf.notes: Henry and Hettie investigate the surrounding area for the whole day.

8JNP9zZl2XJgazLw.title: Pre-Debrief
8JNP9zZl2XJgazLw.notes: Susan tells us that the Frag event was caused by the Tasimale Project done by the Collectors. They tried something that created a rift that caused this event to occur. It didn't trigger until, supposedly, an Object crossed the threshold of the room.

riRG3vd7S2VD7Oap.title: The Time Demon
riRG3vd7S2VD7Oap.notes: Cleo was taken by something causing high amounts of frag.

2w4BMWJUrpVvqYQL.name: Self Care
2w4BMWJUrpVvqYQL.description: Henry takes a month off to receive therapy and exercise. He also attends to his Photo job. This whole month, he is also reading about physics and doing tests to test the boundries of spanning.

Mna5DY4vpMuQLjyS.title: Spokane, Washington Photos Job
Mna5DY4vpMuQLjyS.notes: Henry spends another year taking pictures for that job. Job done up to amount of years unknown.

TRRbxP063FDadhy9.title: Therapy
TRRbxP063FDadhy9.notes: Working with Doctor Lowe on feelings of increasing confidence and self-esteem leading to getting people hurt. This happens intermittently throughout the month.

QkeBEwZOG86qi7vP.title: Self Study
QkeBEwZOG86qi7vP.notes: 16 days worth of studying to try and understand spanning within Henry's own constraints.

eLiyi1RydBWigxLc.name: Pre-Chicago Job Continuum Wrap-up
eLiyi1RydBWigxLc.description: Henry and Hettie decide to span away and get relevant experience they feel they may need for the job, and they set an RV to meet back together when either are done, or if one or both needs to ask a question to each other.

K6rbKWuovpsyjDzc.title: RV
K6rbKWuovpsyjDzc.notes: Hettie and Henry meet up after a month for her and ??? for Henry. We discuss trying to get into a fraternity to get resources to use for the Chicago Job, and Hettie says she is deciding on the Antiquarians. We meet up with Karston and get a private Jet to D.C. to the Smithsonian for a meeting.

EeHKSV5xzkDLDe25.title: Henry Doubletimes A Point
EeHKSV5xzkDLDe25.notes: We explore the Asian History Museum up until a point where we meet Naomi. Henry learns about the sectarian in-fighting that causes different Fraternities to be at odds with each other.

iInf52dLxfhyJwni.title: Henry Doubletimes A Point (Museum)
iInf52dLxfhyJwni.notes: Henry explores the Air and Space Museum, bumping into Karston intermittently as Karston double times for 2 weeks today. Eventually, Hettie meets up with Karston and spends 2 weeks with him. Henry doesn't double time any more, and this takes a day.

mPdfNl0GfVonFXiy.title: Plan Landed, Back At The Roosevelt
mPdfNl0GfVonFXiy.notes: Henry Spans up to the 26th at 8 am, and then heads to the airport to leave on the return trip plane.

vB3WrZ4fqFFWuypN.title: Henry Expresses Concern To Susan
vB3WrZ4fqFFWuypN.notes: Henry thanks Susan for sticking by him even when Henry was venting to Susan about not being told about the thing that could potentially get Cleo hurt. Henry then expresses concern that certain members of the Fraternities are insular in their understanding of what is

25R1KBFcu7f2PD1k.title: Henry Spends 3 months Level
25R1KBFcu7f2PD1k.notes: Henry spans to Florida in June 2024 and lives level to get his affairs in order.

nzRC0EBQPn82tBKl.title: I Am Molded With Fingerprints
nzRC0EBQPn82tBKl.notes: While testing with a bean, I unlock Farsense from Latent to Novice. It leaves me exhausted, so I maintain personal hygiene and tree span back to the Roosevelt tomorrow.

sVoZYs2Yfo0hmcl5.title: Terrible, But Great
sVoZYs2Yfo0hmcl5.notes: Henry arrives in the Dining Room, and he unknowingly shouts with his mind at the other people around him. Susan is told by Henry what Susan asked all those years ago, "I have a minor amount of physicality." Susan reveals the truth about those who are Operant. Henry is Assayed by a man with a white beard, white labcoat, and metallic looking briefcase with a metal helmet.

D7moTCmXibopKYV2.title: I'm A Wizard, But At What Cost?
D7moTCmXibopKYV2.notes: After being assayed, Henry is taken by Dr. Lowe to a place where Henry can learn the basics to turn off his Declaritive Mode (shouting) Farsense, and learn the basics of how to shield himself against probes. This lasts 3 days. Henry remains scared that he has become a problem student for Susan, especially for how things played out when talking with Susan.

JQnoCbpjceQsBvk5.title: Henry Spans Down To Susan
JQnoCbpjceQsBvk5.notes: Henry Spans down to 11/26/2023 to talk to Susan

x2tqlc62jFUsPvx0.name: Henry Gets His Shit Together
x2tqlc62jFUsPvx0.description: Henry gets his affairs in order. Henry realizes he needs to get Operation Nephtys done sooner in his subjective life. Henry expects to live and come back, no First Death yet, but he is preparing in case.

sBKv3XG2HzHwsPz0.title: TTRPG Company
sBKv3XG2HzHwsPz0.notes: Henry spends 3 months making sure his TTRPG company and game take off.

j97AHXi8BKvzKtgp.title: Henry Spends Time With Level Companions
j97AHXi8BKvzKtgp.notes: Henry enjoys levelry with the people in his level life. Eddie, Sandman, Yakiv, local tech community, and TTRPG players.

iTYMHfMDops4RTRc.name: Operation Nephty Part 1s
iTYMHfMDops4RTRc.description: The Operation to stop Karl Krietzfeld and get his Objects.

t0eWao9A2TFk5H73.title: The Building
t0eWao9A2TFk5H73.notes: Karl's building is a decade's long operation that involves every fraternity and is the most measured building in the city other than something related to Al Capone or the Stock Market. "This isn't in history." "And let's keep it that way, gentlemen."

8e6BDkZCYFYWZ53B.title: The Setup
8e6BDkZCYFYWZ53B.notes: The Operation is made and approved. Favors are tanked by a sponsor that is our bosses.

yBKD1srH9sZWbgVp.title: The Room To Chicago
yBKD1srH9sZWbgVp.notes: We span down to November 3rd 2023 and use The Key to get into the corner via a photograph. We met with the Corner Mentor Jaynie Reese. She helps us get our IDs and get ready for the first meeting.

jZ47PDvLp4i4ceHW.title: The First Meeting
jZ47PDvLp4i4ceHW.notes: We meet Karl Krietzfeld at a cafe on North Michigan Avenue and East Ohio Street. Narcs showed up and caused a 4th Maxim violation on Shankers and possibly any level customers/staff that saw. Henry and Hettie deal with Shankers while Alexandra cleans up the place and checks for other levelers who may have seen.

H4RdQGks4KPyckXn.title: Shanker's Introduction
H4RdQGks4KPyckXn.notes: Saulo took all three of us to a place for Shanker's Invitation.

quToFnEnPwLGgWwx.title: Questions To Quicker
quToFnEnPwLGgWwx.notes: Henry and Hettie devise questions to write to the Quicker to see if their investigations reveal anything. They said something strange. "Further information will be acquired here."

ZqCPTX4zxah8xOTq.title: Meeting With Jaiyne
ZqCPTX4zxah8xOTq.notes: Jaynie explains to use that fraternity corners don't have mentors give general debriefs because they don't have access to a lot of information. Hettie calls Susan to ask how to do this. Susan explains that it is best to find general mentors that have access to Span Levels 4 or higher to be able to collate this information. Susan suggests that an Exalted could also work. Henry gets an idea how this information can be "acquired."

eCHGrUtHtfaCKbJK.title: Speaking With An Exalted
eCHGrUtHtfaCKbJK.notes: Henry got the answer that Shanker is definitely involved because the letter, sent by the Quicker, is addressed to Henry, Hettie, and Shanker.

cZwD8eHq3CsLLVjg.title: Meet with Quicker on Scene
cZwD8eHq3CsLLVjg.notes: Told the Quicker, who we do not know if it was the same Quicker on the scene at the Cafe, what we were doing at the cafe. The reason we called this Quicker is because a the AARs that we unknowingly slip-shanked included the Antiquarians reporting that they were on the scene and were disappointed that they were not given objects. We told the Quicker that the Antiquarians were not told by anyone what we do or this particular step in the Operation. Given this security risk, we wanted to tell a the Quicker.

JGomiiQIOt4qvj4J.title: Bringing Shanker in
JGomiiQIOt4qvj4J.notes: We went to the training corner in Chicago to speak to Shanker. Shanker's mentor asks us to meet Shanker at his apartment on the 15th.

sC48AcIhNYbL3sVc.title: Chicago House Surveillance
sC48AcIhNYbL3sVc.notes: Surveilling the house at 4704 West Adams Street West Garfield Park Chicago. Observe a house where the family is awake and active. Everyone seems very upset inside. A woman with a long t shirt, wearing only a long t shirt, is being meanly talked to by the others. Someone else is in the laundry room messing with bed sheets. Someone outside is on a roof observing into the house.

NQELK64fylZdctaC.title: Inviting Shanker To Operation Nephtys
NQELK64fylZdctaC.notes: Hettie brought Shanker back to talk. Shanker explains the narc trying to have him replace an object, Shanker's room mate placing the bowl and trying to replace it, and Shanker pouring out the water and giving the bowl to Saulo.

AVFomBcQ02q4O9qV.title: The Observer Attacks
AVFomBcQ02q4O9qV.notes: The observer attacks. Hettie and the observer fight. Henry observes everything the get the time and place, shoots a capacitazer at the attacking observer, and slip shanks bringing someone in to put the person in cold storage.

wpwHrG6Gm7j7TWHR.title: After The Fight
wpwHrG6Gm7j7TWHR.notes: Three men, one in a suit, show up. The one in the suit takes the narcissist away. One of the other two says "this is the time where you recover him" and by "him" the Quicker points to Low, signifying that we are to deal with the 4th Maxim being broken. When Henry theorizes how to make the bed sheet being stolen, he then asks if they should be the ones to manage inviting Low. The Quicker then disappears immediately.

1C3I4NNXrcpDozaw.title: Inviting Lo Sung
1C3I4NNXrcpDozaw.notes: We go to knock on the Laundry Room door, and speak to Low about his Invitation.

MQ3yPxfUbATbGKAW.title: Inviting Annah
MQ3yPxfUbATbGKAW.notes: Renir and Saoulo speak Annah, Victor, and Alexi about their invitation.

iMlyups9dhwBLac5.name: Chicago Losang's House Time Combat
iMlyups9dhwBLac5.description: The observer attacks. Hettie and the observer fight. Henry observes everything the get the time and place, shoots a capacitazer at the attacking observer, and slip shanks bringing someone in to put the person in cold storage.

U8nrNQlmoDOqcjtT.title: Pre-fight T-1
U8nrNQlmoDOqcjtT.notes: I observe the person watching the house. I suggest that Hettie gemini and stealth observe the observer, I will observe them as redundancy, and junior Hettie and Shanker will observe the house.

r9TPcQrXFOsPAnQn.title: Pre-fight T-0
r9TPcQrXFOsPAnQn.notes: The observer on the roof spots me. I take the time down.

css26RnYTDO0Ac4O.title: The Fight
css26RnYTDO0Ac4O.notes: The observer spans behind me into the room, appearing as a female, and she fights elder Hettie. They each trade one hit to each other, Hettie getting a better hit on the opponent's head than the opponent did on Hettie. Henry quick-draws his capacitazer, and he shoots the opponent, stunning her. Henry the slipshanks in help to put this asshole in cold storage.

TM3cwKfbdZLSzcT4.name: Introducing Losang
TM3cwKfbdZLSzcT4.description: After observing a house with Tibetan Prayer Flags (again, for Taylor), and the first narcissist is captured by Quicker, we find that Losang is attacked by a narcissist, a narcissist that spans in to steal a bedsheet from Losang, and then spanning away.

6nDLtr7ePNOO48M9.title: The Quicker Take The Asshole To Storage
6nDLtr7ePNOO48M9.notes: The Quicker take the first narcissist, and then direct us to address that Losang experienced a 4th Maxim trigger.

6xpViudbjA17N0GV.title: We Go With Saulo To Invite Losang

PCU4ZkRHo6ICw4la.title: Losang Accepts
PCU4ZkRHo6ICw4la.notes: We talk Losang through the beginnings of what being a Spanner means. It includes the conversation about having to give the cousin and family of Losang's a medical exam without their knowledge.

Oqtz71JZ8dZIJn2l.name: Introducing Annah
Oqtz71JZ8dZIJn2l.description: We introduce Annah from an event involving The Lamp Object. The thing turns out to be to facilitate her invitation.

2CPZ1dVk0p8EFjOJ.title: We Figure Out The Lamp
2CPZ1dVk0p8EFjOJ.notes: We find out that the paint in the room the lamp was in, and the paint on Annah's room mate's finger nail, fell off. Turns out the lamp removes any paint in a radius.

7HN0pKQvJ4pxPcBi.title: We Get Told By Someone To Do A Thing
7HN0pKQvJ4pxPcBi.notes: Someone told us to go to Annah's apartment to investigate some levellers. "There would be aggrevated levellers there with no violence, and told to observe it."

DehNXQ2BqBeMfsbP.title: Desi Introduces The Exercise
DehNXQ2BqBeMfsbP.notes: Desi, Hettie, and Henry look away from the kitchen as Desi introduces the exercise. Annah and Losang start observing, observing the items and their orientations and conditions. After several hours of discussion and questions, Annah asks Desi what food choices should be here (to externalize the source) the two decide to be the observers and shoppers

fJvajvBgvHnhc2mc.title: Spanning Down To Meet Annah And Losang

vZ2jaqn3zgn0PLnK.title: Spanning Down To Meet Annah And Losang
vZ2jaqn3zgn0PLnK.notes: Hettie and I restocked the fridge.

CpzNaZdTip4GUGfm.name: Grooming Kit
CpzNaZdTip4GUGfm.description: Henry realizes that it has been too long since he found out his uncle's comb was an Object, if the others were, why hasn't he tested them already? What if he has, and he's been forgetting as part of their power.

OZHXxKdS5rUQEzBK.title: Henry asks Losang and Annah For A Favor
OZHXxKdS5rUQEzBK.notes: Henry gives instructions to Losang and Annah to fill an IOU2 card out and give it to Desi in the event that Henry is right and that he is forgetting things after he tests them. The two agree.

ElT4DUHdEJxcm6QS.title: Henry Tests The Grooming Kit
ElT4DUHdEJxcm6QS.notes: Henry goes to the bathroom and tests the kit out.

uAUoqR9W4LulJ3tq.title: Henry Discerns The Objects
uAUoqR9W4LulJ3tq.notes:
The Grooming Kit:
The Grooming Kit is a Leather Prism that is about the size of a hardback novel. There are 8 leather loops inside that can hold various things, cylindrical things, one loop for a rectangular thing, and more. There are smaller, rectangular loops on the inside of one of the lids that can contain smaller things and a pocket that could hold a comb. It has a maker's mark on the inside of the spine that says "Hebib Leathers" with a picture of a stylized cow hide. Another imprinted mark says "Made in Endea" with that typo. The fact that India is spelled wrong makes me suspect that this is a bootleg. That will make tracking down what contents the inside of this thing should have easier/harder.

In the Grooming Kit:
Main Loops:
[Empty loop] (Look like there should be a Nail File)
[Empty loop] (Look like there should be Nail Clippers)
[Empty loop]
[Empty loop]
[Empty loop]
[Empty loop]
[Empty loop]
[Empty loop]

Small Rectangular Loops:
Razor
Scissors
Tweezers (can be given scratches, does not stylistically fit the look of the scissors, bent out of usefulness)
[Empty] (Looks like there should be something the size of a cigarette but rectangular in here)
And more [Empty] of an amount not yet set by the GM

Comb Pocket:
[Empty pocket] (The Comb went there)

4Ik9U1yxLpjNsc88.title: Henry Gives The Grooming Kit To Himself
4Ik9U1yxLpjNsc88.notes: Henry gets a Spanner Locker to leave the Grooming Kit for himself. Young Henry expects that Elder Henry will span in to keep an eye on the Grooming Kit.

hhZHuR7gZl30hyro.name: Asking Annah
hhZHuR7gZl30hyro.description: Henry talks to Annah about how she's doing in the Continuum. Annah expresses that she feels like she is not doing enough because it took her 3 months to complete her In-between. Henry expresses what his mentor, Susan, expressed to Henry that spanners are given the opportunity to join based upon a person's talents, and encourages counseling.

aeDrXXv2VdvT8eTS.title: Henry Asks How Annah Is Doing
aeDrXXv2VdvT8eTS.notes: Annah expresses that she feels like she is not doing enough because Saulo said it took her 3 months to complete her In-between. Henry expresses what his mentor, Susan, expressed to Henry that spanners are given the opportunity to join based upon a person's talents, and if Annah feels like that, Henry has many talented people for Annah to talk to. Annah said that Henry seems like the perfect spanner with his suit, confidence, and mysterious background. That had an impact on how Henry saw himself and how he compared himself to his Mentor, Susan.

AJSb6nOZUBnfNqYL.title: Henry Gets Mad
AJSb6nOZUBnfNqYL.notes: Henry talks with Desi about what Annah told him, and Desi assures Henry that Saulo make the decision as he was allowed to, and Annah taking it badly is how Annah took it.

jz5qg15G9HbVvWrs.title: Showing Annah
jz5qg15G9HbVvWrs.notes: Desi has Henry fly with spanning to show Annah what can be done, and Desi has Henry tell Annah about the mistake that Henry made when he tried to do this without consulting his mentor first (he was in pain for days). Desi and Annah reach an understanding of setting a pace that fits Annah, but only in a safe manner by working together. When walking inside, Henry still encourages Annah to get psychological counseling, and Annah still seems split -not wanting to do it, but only as a requirement. Henry encourages it, but will not ask Desi for Annah unless Annah is willing to commit for her own sake. Will she?

NU4ch0izKm1i9HGj.name: Appraising Span 1s
NU4ch0izKm1i9HGj.description: Henry and Hettie observe the progress of Losong, Annah, and other novices. For Henry, this is mainly to see if they are affected by the Objects in any way, and to make sure they are not recruited/coerced/attacked by narcissists.

m7y4tNSYVWuerxGu.title: Henry Appraises Annah's & Losang's Skills
m7y4tNSYVWuerxGu.notes: Henry watches the Span 1s practice, then help clean the gym.

YZ6D7rpx8QXiDUtP.title: Henry Learns A Lot About Explaining Time Travel
YZ6D7rpx8QXiDUtP.notes: Henry learns to start with the fact that higher Span Levels cannot explain the particulars of why things happen exactly how they do, and they don't explain it for safety reasons. Have people first buy into the faith that they give to people in the Continuum, and do that before giving the simple explanation for the mechanics of causality, frag, etc.

NyadeEkwb78B4zJQ.title: Henry goes back to the morning of the training day
NyadeEkwb78B4zJQ.notes: Henry is back watching the Span 1s train. They learn about Double Time and Gemini.

RckCT7ksV1useKgv.title: Training Ends With Frag Hunt
RckCT7ksV1useKgv.notes: Desi addresses us to face our Frag

niUEOjfNnJiFVNbv.name: Blue Sky Rising
niUEOjfNnJiFVNbv.description:
Hettie, Franklin Grimm and I stole Carl's, the Blue Sky Rise Engineer, phone and put it into the weight plate of Carl's dumbbell. There was a sense of fraternity in Blue Sky Rise.
Hettie and I got a tin-type photo of the Quicker of Blue Sky Rise.
I learned a bit about the behavior of a Quicker and the powers they have.

8j7ZIr3RT4sPj0b8.title: Christmas At Bluesky Rising
8j7ZIr3RT4sPj0b8.notes: Many festivities, many existential crisis, and gifts given to people who enjoy them. Henry is accepted into a place by the people there.

HOgzpSvgwhm6WBDY.name: Studying In Northern Flordia
HOgzpSvgwhm6WBDY.description:
Studying small business start-up course for 10 weeks

Hung out with Eddie

rFUfqShWXMjuEBqN.name: POP Culture & Soc. Cham
rFUfqShWXMjuEBqN.description: Spent a couple months training at Bluesky. While I prevented myself from abandoning my responsibilities, I met many people including the Corner mentor and the Corner's Quicker. I took classes on Quick-changing my clothes and how to be a social chameleon.

HDRqgtkOriOaQpTL.title: The Will Anomaly
HDRqgtkOriOaQpTL.notes: Met weird time-traveling causality-enforcing group. After my uncle's will attorney turned out to be a nefarious time traveler.

UpZZkzZn4rt6pXkm.title: Met Susan At The Roosevelt
UpZZkzZn4rt6pXkm.notes: Got introduced to the basic idea of what the Continuum is.

zjECo13SaiLpn3SX.title: The In-Between
zjECo13SaiLpn3SX.notes: Learning to Span, will be revealed at Span Level 3

lgIlhDWvYyxF40zW.title: Spanned up 1 day
lgIlhDWvYyxF40zW.notes: Testing, I have 364 days of resource left.

nnV674omSAVkR80v.title: The Comb Incident
nnV674omSAVkR80v.notes: Met Four the Quicker. Learned both the Continuum and Alexander knew about the risk and let me have the comb anyway.

zU26IaN8M4VaT4y4.title: Stopping The Narcissists
zU26IaN8M4VaT4y4.notes: Spanned down after a firefight with narcissists, and we set a trap for a guy Tim knew.

FPGTEmQD01HL4MNH.title: Firefight With Narcissists
FPGTEmQD01HL4MNH.notes: At a bowling alley to stop narcissists from taking an Object.

EvrxzspkTK7DMtQi.name: The Fridge Exercise
EvrxzspkTK7DMtQi.description: An exercise in learning how to manage information and rely on others to avoid learning of one's Yet.

EOvJl6atnUc62INu.title: Susan Shows Us The Fridge
EOvJl6atnUc62INu.notes: Susan makes sure we see the fridge, and then afterward asks us to fill it yesterday.

KytrlCy542atxDvH.name: Downtime
KytrlCy542atxDvH.description: Spanned from the Roosevelt Inn to Florida, then from Florida To Roosevelt Inn

XoWPXqxXQQPnkvrr.name: Frag Time Combat Practice
XoWPXqxXQQPnkvrr.description: Susan frags Henry, and that gives the group experience in the first time combat. We figured out Susan created a loop for the Mexican clock at the Christmas Party. Our team solved and resolved this.

continuum.notes: This is the time that Henry acts as an Assistant Mentor to Losang and Annah. He starts by learning from Desi how to guide new Spanners, and he waits for the time that the two are ready to be invited to Operation Nephtys.

RyXyrXMfDUod7Eij.title: Invitation To Dance More
RyXyrXMfDUod7Eij.notes: Henry and Hettie invite Losong and Annah to join Operation Nephtys

3vJ0Mz6dQBK4aqJ7.title: Henry goes to take the Grooming Kit From Himself

IB3btB0GMoltMvyF.name: Old&New Frag Hunt
IB3btB0GMoltMvyF.description: Desi instructs Span 2s Hettie and Henry, and she instructs Span 1s Losang and Annah, on how to do Time Combat

k3vzBhQEIDcOHCpb.title: Phase 1
k3vzBhQEIDcOHCpb.notes:
Annah offers to leaves the room when it is clear the others are hiding something from here. She leaves to prepare snacks and, at Henry's suggestion still be doing something to train herself, review her span log and try to recall any as-as nots through memory.

Henry, Hettie, and Losang ask Desi for a source of information on why to investigate Annah's apartment. While not saying it out loud, Henry thinks that maybe Annah djinned herself and others by having everyone act on the information to create the information of Henry, Hettie, Shanker, and Losang to investgate Annah's apartment.

GlRV4ro9rff6VOmC.title: Phase 2
GlRV4ro9rff6VOmC.notes:
Hettie and Losang contact everyone inside the apartment to see if they experienced frag from a source inside Annah's apartment on the day that The Lamp event happened.

Henry asks Taylor for advice on investigations. Henry avoids giving Taylor a yet nor creating a djinn or fragging people with the job Taylor asked Henry to do already. Henry then goes back 12 days to disguise himself, bribe the janitor at Annah's apartment, and then do the job of a janitor to set up cameras and measure and the public access hallways between the entrance of the complex and the door to Annah's apartment. Henry finds nothing odd to indicate a Narc did something.

v3aFgkU4Ku23Tn0V.title: RV 2
v3aFgkU4Ku23Tn0V.notes:
Reiner: "For your intentions, no. I will tell you this. Any frag I do or do not have is not related to you."

Saulo: "I am not fragged, but something might be coming. I had a feeling it was coming. On the Horizon."

Josh: "I don't like frag, it makes me start swinging. I'm ready with a bat full of nails."
Questions: Did Hettie talk to younger Josh, or elder Josh? Did this Josh even go to that apartment yet?

YIlo0WFoFl4fX9mD.title: RV 1
YIlo0WFoFl4fX9mD.notes:
Everyone returns. Desi says that there is someone who has information on why the apartment should be investigated. That person is Annah.

Have an information conversation with Desi.

"You experience frag in a linear manner. Age as past, Yet as future. Normal for your experience with Spanning. There will come a time when you will need to separate your subjective and objective experience, even to yourself, in a non-linear way."

Henry asks if we should learn why Elder Annah was at the apartment when we investigated The Lamp. Desi says that we should not get option lock, so she tells us that Annah was there for reasons unrelated for how we believe (thus, not a Djinn).

Losang asks several pointed questions that rules out the potential of things like his invitation being an attack, and more.

The group decide their next phase to be that Henry investigates for Narc traps outside the apartment, and Hettie and Losang will investigate everyone inside the apartment for who may have been fragged.

SOit2H3ZYs7zv7Qr.title: Henry Asks Desi For Help
SOit2H3ZYs7zv7Qr.notes: Desi says that Henry can tell Taylor "I don't think I can do that, ask me later." when Taylor asks for Henry to do the job Henry already did but Taylor didn't ask about yet.

mYJhtBz476mYZgRN.description: Overcome Exercise-induced Asthma by being able to exercise without needing inhaler
mYJhtBz476mYZgRN.condition: Speaking to my medical specialists, looking at programs that worked for others, and try to find ways to mitigate the effects of, or (if lucky) even remove, the illness.

I4gPyY8t4sYVLjJO.condition: Lending my services at a food bank either with my degree or just doing manual labor

BrzAyh6np4jyXqEU.description: Assist With The Bowling Alley Incident
BrzAyh6np4jyXqEU.condition: Observing The Regulators act to apprehend the narcissists, and assist them however I can.

CBIMQKDiRw56Jvl5.condition: Scheduling a time to do stretches of weeks of photos saved up.

sYtqk2ZQfseaNG7H.condition: Get a job at a TTRPG company, or help my previous relations start our own company

jfYpvV9dY3P4fCRj.condition: Get romantic and caring people in my life that I feel wanted by and that I want to support (get romantic partner(s), get close friends I consider siblings, create community I participate in and support the betterment of.)

WGavDIU3KEsEsFrX.description: Don't Visibly Age so levellers don't notice somethings up with me
WGavDIU3KEsEsFrX.condition: Limit aging outside of level life, moisturize every day

xlgGSTUqie5xzjwi.condition: Asking for help for someone else to give me what I need to know so I don't frag myself from what I've seen, but only tell me what I need to know so I

KAATD3bjtKChoqqK.description: Complete The Frag Exercise/Time Combat Practice
KAATD3bjtKChoqqK.condition: Establishing an RV in another location, and work with my team to

0qV7ClukPEBtMTwN.condition: Working with my team to figure out how to transfer the paper one at a time into each of our pockets so we do not damage the paper nor frag ourselves

Cy4ee07zns0l0hYT.condition: Travel with Susan, based out of the Roosevelt, to explore the local area while keeping my focus as far away from current events as possible

UqWi3hVlROt006yl.condition: I will observe an event at 3104 North Ceder Street, Spokane, Washington

CgxbdXRLsrB7uLaA.condition: Practice reverse-observation of the Pizza Delivery man

IsIe7ZBNRIUxeFIS.description: Collect The Bar of Soap From The Bank Robbers
IsIe7ZBNRIUxeFIS.condition: Scouting the Robbers' last known heist location and tailing them back (to prevent them from striking again later because waiting around to prepare would mean they could strike again)

qHHjbXzDxXCl0Qkl.description: Henry got his Span log leaked
qHHjbXzDxXCl0Qkl.condition: Making sure it NEVER AGAIN happens. I will cover it up as an ARG that used the house as a dead drop location for a clue, but then make it seem like the ARG got cancelled

N43U84lVxItaaQum.description: "Take [Karl Kroustfelt] Off The Board" and acquire his Objects
N43U84lVxItaaQum.condition: Completing Operation Nephtys: Doing a Step by Step plan to get into Chicago, get the objects, and take Karl "Off The Board"

MuxdenzW0XLa5Nne.condition: Attend, make contacts, and do the work to better myself

eeuqgRgoXg6zUc9I.description: Track down the fake lawyer that stole my Uncle's Leather Batten Shoes
eeuqgRgoXg6zUc9I.condition: Investigating the lawyer at my will reading and delivering that intel to Josh in 1970.

3vat0qWhRyihiKeb.condition: going to the Job Fair and then choosing which Fraternity I would join.

GCkpLWbU1LzosZf4.description: Solve The Harper Walton Time Combat

Fc5TwnxVc9P7fWmu.description: Solving The Mystery Of The Photograph
Fc5TwnxVc9P7fWmu.condition: Going to Gallup, New Mexico and investigating my hunch.

0sTMjrCIbagyasKg.condition: Studying physics, meditating with my Inheritor in mind, and performing my own tests.

BK0Uq2XToZNVS1kr.condition: Scheduling a time to do stretches of weeks of photos saved up.

u3NAVLUJsIhlsiCy.description: Spokane, Washington house basement starting 2023/11/01 @ 6 p.m. (18) every day for 10 seconds, I physically went out on the front lawn on January 3rd.

AqOmkIv0x3rsitNa.description: The Roosevelt cannot have boarding because the Lobby is used for "an event" as Susan puts it.

7looF1LtNtmnc7MZ.description: Measuring Susan Oracled between 8 p.m. to 11 p.m. in dining room (Elder don't be here) Took 27 days of spanning up.  Took a cookie

RTxhY2NE24j1Icx0.description: Waiting to catch Susan in my Roosevelt Room Got to know Hettie and Alex, stayed in there so my Elder can take the time to be elsewhere.
